description: CompositionPink round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline and in-seam, half sleeves and graphic with flock print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Celebrate with Henry David lee his pride in his company, lee, that has been doling out absolutely comfortable, stylish and durable jean and casual wear for more than a century now, with this cotton t-shirt from Lee. The summery print of coconut trees swaying in the warm cloudy outline highlighting the brand sets the perfect mood for those happy days. Team it with jeans or shorts and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
